title: notopleura patria var. patria
intro: Notopleura patria var. patria is a species of plant in the Rubiaceae family, also known as the coffee or madder family, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In traditional herbal medicine, Notopleura patria var. patria is prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
